case_title: MILLER, DOUGLAS VS DUSAY, CATHERINE MRS.: PROPERTY OWNER et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO CATHERINE DUSAY RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, DOUGLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUSAY, CATHERINE MRS.: PROPERTY OWNER $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 INTEREST, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.00, DEFT VINCENT MCMAHON IS DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE SINCE HE WAS NOT SERVED WITH THE COMPLAINT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO PLAINT. RETURNED NO SUCH NUMBER.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DUSAY, CATHERINE MRS.: PROPERTY OWNER
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DUSAY, CATHERINE MRS.: PROPERTY OWNER
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DUSAY, CATHERINE MRS.: PROPERTY OWNER
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT DUSAY, CATHERINE MRS.: PROPERTY OWNER
